person.name: Thomas de Morley 4th Baron Morley

deathPlace.address: Calais, Nord Pas De Calais, France

burialPlace.address: Austin Friars Church Cemetery, Norwich, Norfolk, England

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Thomas de Morley, 4th Baron Morley, KG (c. 1354-24 September 1416) was a baron in the Peerage of England, Lord of Morley, Hingham, Hockering, &c., in Norfolk, de jure Lord Marshall, hereditary Earl Marshal of Ireland, and a Privy Councillor. He was summoned to parliament from 20 October 1379 to 3 September 1416.

Thomas Morley was the second but eldest surviving son and heir of Sir William de Morley, 3rd Baron Morley (d. 30 April 1379) by his spouse Lady Cecily Bardolf (d. 23 November 1386), daughter of Thomas Bardolf, 2nd Baron Bardolf.

In 1375 he was a Knight serving in Brittany in the expedition of the Duke of Brittany and Earl of Cambridge. In 1386, upon rumours of an intended invasion, he was, as Lord Morley, the Chief Commissioner ordered to survey Great Yarmouth and make provisions for its defence.

In 1391 Lord Morley received permission to go on crusade in Prussia.

In 1399 he accompanied King Richard II on his disastrous journey to Ireland. In July 1415 he set out with King Henry V on the expedition which culminated in the great victory of the Battle of Agincourt, but it does not appear, however, that he fought in the battle. In 1416 he was Lieutenant and Captain-General of forces assembled to proceed to France.

Lord Morley died later that year at Calais, where he was lodging at the house of a merchant. After a service at the Church of Notre Dame in Calais, at which both King Henry V and Sigismund, Holy Roman Emperor, were present, his body was returned to England and buried in the Austin Friars Church at Norwich, Norfolk.

«b»Lord Morley married three times:«/b»

(1) before 3 April 1374, Joan de Hastings (Norfolk, 1357 - before 1380), daughter of Sir Hugh de Hastings, Knt. (died c. 1369), by Margaret de Everingham, daughter of Adam de Everingham 2nd Baron Everingham, by whom Lord Morley had one son, Sir Robert de Morley, Knt. (circa 1375 - before 12 November 1403), d.v.p., who married before August 1394 Isabel de Molines and had Thomas de Morley, 5th Baron Morley. She is buried in the Church of the White Friars, Norwich, Norfolk.

(2) before 10 June 1380, Elizabeth (surname unknown).

(3) before 21 October 1390 (date of Papal dispensation), Anne le Despencer, daughter of Edward le Despencer, 1st Baron le Despencer and Lady Elizabeth Burghersh and widow of Sir Hugh de Hastings, Knt., (d.1386), of Elsing, Norfolk. She died 30 October 1426, and was buried in the Church of the Austin friars, Norwich. By Lord Morley she had no issue.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Morley 4th Baron Morley於大約1354年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可洛頓時，他的父親William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley36歲，母親Cecily Bardolf31歲。他於1374年4月與Joan Hastings在英國英格蘭諾福爾可摩利 聖 彼得結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1416年9月24日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Morley 4th Baron Morley于大约1354年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可洛頓时，他的父亲William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley36岁，母亲Cecily Bardolf31岁。他于1374年4月与Joan Hastings在英国英格兰諾福爾可摩利 聖 彼得结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1416年9月24日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Morley (for example in Derbyshire, County Durham, Norfolk, and Yorkshire), or Moreleigh in Devon, all of which are named from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murghaile ‘descendant of Murghal’, a personal name based on muir ‘sea’ + gal ‘valour’.
Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murthuile ‘descendant of Murthuile’, a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’ + tuile ‘tide’.

variants.name: Marler
meanings: occupational name from Middle English marler, either ‘spreader of marl (as fertilizer)’ or ‘hewer or quarrier of marl’.
topographic name from Middle English marlere ‘marl-pit’ (Old French marliere).
in Norfolk, perhaps also a variant of   Morley  .

variants.name: Murley
meanings: Irish (Cork and Kerry): variant of   Morley  .

English (Cornwall and Somerset): habitational name from Murley in Uplowman (Devon). The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. There may well have been some confusion with Morley .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Morley 4th Baron Morley was born about 1354, in Roydon, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley, was 36 and his mother, Cecily Bardolf, was 31. He married Joan Hastings in April 1374, in Morley St Peter, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 24 September 1416, in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 63, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Morley 4th Baron Morley est né environ 1354, à Roydon, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Cecily Bardolf, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Joan Hastings en avril 1374, à Morley St Peter, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1416, à Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Morley, Norfolk, England: Morley St Peter, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Morley 4th Baron Morley um 1354 in Roydon, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley 36 und seine Mutter Cecily Bardolf 31. Er hat im April 1374 in Morley St Peter, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Joan Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. September 1416 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Morley, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 모를리 스트 피터
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Morley 4th Baron Morley(이)가 대략 1354년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 로이던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Bardolf(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1374년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 모를리 스트 피터에서 Joan Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1416년 9월 24일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Morley 4th Baron Morley nasceu aproximadamente 1354, em Roydon, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Bardolf, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Hastings em abril de 1374, em Morley St Peter, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1416, em Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Morley, Norfolk, England: морли ст питир, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Morley 4th Baron Morley родился около 1354 г. в местности роидон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Bardolf, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Hastings апрель 1374 г. в местности морли ст питир, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 сентября 1416 г. в местности пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
